title: LeMo-NADe: Multi-Parameter Neural Architecture Discovery with LLMs

method.framework_name: LeMo-NADe (Large Language Model guided Neural Architecture Discovery)
key_components: Expert system with configurable rules and user-defined metrics
method.process: Iterative approach with progressive refinement of generated neural architecture

capabilities: Creating novel neural architectures from scratch

contributions: Formalized and designed a search-space agnostic neural architecture discovery framework (LeMo-NADe) leveraging LLMs
Proposed an expert system with rules and metrics to drive LLMs toward discovering different neural architectures
Implemented LeMo-NADe as a highly configurable/efficient tool
Evaluated LeMo-NADe using CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, and ImageNet16-120 datasets
